TextView.android:text: Bathroom pipe burst, need experienced plumber ASAP.
Weekend cleanup drive at the community park. All welcome!
Need 4 volunteers to help distribute meal kits to elderly neighbors.
Need someone to pick up groceries from D-Mart, Sector 14.
Immediate grocery help needed at Sector 14. This is an urgent request from elderly neighbor.
Feel free to check out community projects. We are happy to have you here!
John is offering house help in your building. Check it out now.
